location: Sold by Patches once he sets up his shop at Murkwater Cave (after being encountered/spared there), for 1,000 Runes. Also purchasable later from the Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold once you've acquired Patches' Bell Bearing.
tactics: Reach Murkwater Cave from Agheel Lake North Site of Grace (it sits roughly midway between Limgrave Tunnels and Murkwater Coast graces); you must first fight and spare/survive Patches there so he opens shop.
If you killed Patches or missed him, his Bell Bearing (dropped later in the game) lets the Twin Maiden Husks sell the same shield at Roundtable Hold instead.
Murkwater Cave itself contains its own Site of Grace once entered, so no need to backtrack far to shop repeatedly.
lore: A tall but lightweight wooden shield, easy to wield despite its size, decorated with a circular horsehead crest meant to evoke a swift, galloping charge.

builds.name: Early-game Strength turtle
builds.why: Cheap D-scaling Strength shield with solid physical block (93%), good stopgap before finding a metal shield.
